site.title: Haven Design & Build LLC
site.tagline: Designing, Building & Repairing your home, one detail at a time.

email.notes: Replace YOUR_FORMSPREE_ID with your Formspree form ID from https://formspree.io

stripe.notes: Get keys from https://dashboard.stripe.com and create a payment link

analytics.notes: Get ID from https://analytics.google.com (starts with G-)

services.title: Kitchen Remodel
services.description: Transform your kitchen into a culinary masterpiece. From custom cabinetry to state-of-the-art appliances, we design kitchens that blend aesthetics with functionality.

services.title: Bathroom Renovation
services.description: Create your personal spa retreat. We design luxurious bathrooms with premium fixtures, spa-like features, and impeccable tile work.

services.title: Basement Finishing & Garage Spaces
services.description: Unlock the potential of your basement and garage. We transform unfinished spaces into beautiful, functional areas.

services.title: Outdoor Living Space
services.description: Extend your living experience outdoors with custom patio design, deck construction, and landscaping integration.

testimonials.text: The elevation in design quality Haven brought to our home was profound. Their builders are true artisans of their craft.
testimonials.author: Marcus L.

testimonials.text: Renovating a luxury property is daunting, but Haven's team delivered a flawless execution of our vision with professional grace.
testimonials.author: Sofia K.

testimonials.text: More than just your typical contractors. Walked with us in the design and build of our latest property.
testimonials.author: James M.

deployment.notes: This is a static site - can be hosted anywhere. No backend needed (unless using advanced Stripe integration).
